meta.note: contributions are capped/conditional POINTS per signal (they sum to net_score); raw_signals are the uncapped harvested values.

narrative_interp_split.label: Data/interpretation section split
narrative_interp_split.caveat: raw data/narrative held apart from how it is understood and contextualized

manuscripts.label: Named manuscripts
manuscripts.weight: +2 per, capped +6; doubled for teachings/books of the Bible
manuscripts.caveat: fixed list; generic mention counts as 1

location_bonus.label: Location + archaeology bonus
location_bonus.caveat: location articles with an archaeology hit

balanced_debate.label: Balanced debate in interpretation sections
balanced_debate.weight: +1 per, capped +3; doubled when 2+ named representatives cited
balanced_debate.caveat: interpretation sections only; sentences mentioning other religions excluded

confessional_balance.label: Confessional balance
confessional_balance.caveat: fires when a critical-scholarship historian (Ehrman et al.) is cited anywhere, footnotes included: -3 outside interpretation sections (footnotes count as outside), -1 in interpretation without an Evangelical counterpart, 0 with one

ancient_historians.label: Non-Christian ancient historians
ancient_historians.caveat: scores 0 for parables; 8-name list incl. Mara bar Serapion, Lucian, Celsus, Phlegon

niche_bonus.label: Niche exposure bonus
niche_bonus.caveat: tiered — protects short, well-researched niche topics

jesus_seminar.label: Jesus Seminar citations
jesus_seminar.weight: -2 per, capped -6; x2 in data sections, x0.5 if interpretation-only
jesus_seminar.caveat: stance-blind keyword match; placement multiplier applied to capped penalty

other_religion.label: Other-religion sources
other_religion.caveat: Islamic, Mormon, Buddhist, Hindu, Sikh, Jain, Rastafari, Baha'i material cited as authoritative

mythicist.label: Mythicist citations
mythicist.weight: -3 per, capped -9; x2 in data sections, x0.5 if interpretation-only
mythicist.caveat: stance-blind keyword match; placement multiplier applied to capped penalty
